rulings.Case Title: CATHAY BANK, A CALIFORNIA BANKING CORPORATION VS. RAYMOND XIANG ZHANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Cathay Bank'S Order To Show Cause Why The Appointment Of A Receiver Should Not Be Confirmed (Per Ex Parte Order Of 06/28/10)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 6, 2010, line 8, Plaintiff Cathay Bank's Order To Show Cause Why The Appointment Of A Receiver Should Not Be Confirmed (Per Ex Parte Order Of 06/28/10). MOTION WAS GRANTED PREVIOUSLY. COUNSEL WERE TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING LANGUAGE OF THE ORDER. HEARING REQUIRED, UNLESS COUNSEL HAVE AGREED UPON THE LANGUAGE AND PROVIDE THE ORDER TO THE COURT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ROBERT GORTON VS. REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTOR'S
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Petition Of Writ Of Mandate As Timely
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 6, 2010, line 9, PETITIONER CHARLES GORTON'S Motion To Deem Petition Of Writ Of Mandate As Timely. OFF CALENDAR, PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE IT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1013a(1). A NON-PARTY NEEDS TO SERVE ANY MOTION. IN ADDITION, THIS MOTION IS UNNECESSARY BECAUSE WHETHER THE PETITION WAS TIMELY FILED CAN BE RAISED AT THE HEARING ON THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JAWT GREENWALD et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, August 6, 2010, line 10, DEFENDANT JAWJ GREENWALD'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER OVERRULED. THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT ARE ACCEPTED AS TRUE FOR PURPOSES OF DEMURRER. DEFENDANT RAISES FACTUAL ISSUES THAT MAY NOT BE RESOLVED BY WAY OF DEMURRER. THE DOCKET INDICATES THAT DEFENDANT HAS A MOTION TO STRIKE CALENDARED FOR AUGUST 31 SO DEFENDANT IS NOT OBLIGATED TO ANSWER UNTIL THAT MOTION IS RESOLVED. =(302/CWW)
